item.title: Not for the faint-hearted: a terrible monster attacked a falcon's nest when the chicks were alone. The poor things miraculously survived.

item.dc:creator: Grogu007

item.title: Jon Stewart and Mehdi Hasan had an incredible conversation
item.description:
They talked a lot about the "fox cinematic universe".
Dismantling the orange one's agenda.
Damn you Merrick B. Garland!
They spoke a lot about Gaza and the worldwide impact of the situation.
The failing of the Democratic Party was also a big thing. I recommend everyone to spend this 1 hour and 20 min watching this entertaining broadcast. I personally learned a lot of new views. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8IXXOZhkaPE
item.dc:creator: onushka

item.title: good doggos play hide and go seek
item.dc:creator: ManoloBIahnik

item.title: When your friend starts rubbing off on you
item.dc:creator: DropDrop

item.title: Oh, what an odd thing to say
item.description: Institutional investors may control 40% of U.S. single-family rental homes by 2030, according to MetLife Investment Management. And a group of Washington, D.C., lawmakers say Wall Street needs to back away from the market. Corporations backed by private equity groups such as Blackstone and Pretium Partners bought tens of thousands of homes across the U.S. Sun Belt. https://www.cnbc.com/2023/02/21/how-wall-street-bought-single-family-homes-and-put-them-up-for-rent.html To the 42(up from 33 initial downvotes) Blackstone employees/bots who downvoted the post within an hour, suck it, it went viral, now STOP buying single family homes Other stuff Conan Norm MacDonald https://imgur.com/gallery/eFWDAGB https://imgur.com/gallery/QFl0JtF https://imgur.com/gallery/rS7AXcL https://imgur.com/gallery/ZqNFxns
item.dc:creator: Grogu007

item.description: https://www.jackhopkinsnow.com/p/the-women-epstein-tried-to-silence?r=2nqsjv&utm_campaign=post&utm_medium=web Let the women handle it. You thought you get away electing a rapist and convicted felon into office? Fuck no. C'mon America! Do your thang!

item.title: ADHD and Autism Memes Vol 3
item.description:
These posts are my solution, sort of
I'm picking back up where I left off clearing out some of the memes I spent a frankly absurd amount of time organizing into folders on my phone. As always, I Hope you all enjoyed. I used to post all of the links to my past posts below but the ends of these posts were getting a bit unwieldy. So, at the risk of overcomplicating things I've made a few (sometimes pretty loosely) categorized repositories of my past posts if you'd like to see more I'll link to those below. Movies, TV, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/qWQKZr5 Books, Comics, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/0unBaDX Gaming, Tech, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/17tib1E Food, Family, and Animals https://imgur.com/gallery/zlsjOQa Work, Politics and America https://imgur.com/gallery/zQrWXQE ADHD, Autism, Mental Health, and Millenial https://imgur.com/gallery/G1E6yWd NSFW Memes https://imgur.com/gallery/2I9HXEp Reactions https://imgur.com/gallery/uDjMX0P
item.dc:creator: GeeeButtersnaps

item.title: The history of this particular trope.
item.dc:creator: countervail247365

item.title: Good morning!
item.description:
That's just physics
It's my cake day so now seems to be a good time to post! Where I've been: in and out of the hospital getting poked, prodded, and dissected. It's been exhausting. I got diagnosed with stage 4 colon cancer. I'm looking at a whole lot of chemo and more surgeries ahead. I'm fortunate that I have good insurance and a good job that is being very supportive, plus I'm surrounded by good people helping me out. None of this is getting me down, though. I haven't even frowned at the news. I'll keep on keeping on and post when I feel like posting. Come find me on Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/zert.bsky.social Link is in my profile now too.
item.dc:creator: WazertFromBlueSky

item.title: Mental Health Memes Vol 2
item.description: I'm picking back up where I left off clearing out some of the memes I spent a frankly absurd amount of time organizing into folders on my phone. As always, I Hope you all enjoyed. I used to post all of the links to my past posts below but the ends of these posts were getting a bit unwieldy. So, at the risk of overcomplicating things I've made a few (sometimes pretty loosely) categorized repositories of my past posts if you'd like to see more I'll link to those below. Movies, TV, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/qWQKZr5 Books, Comics, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/0unBaDX Gaming, Tech, and More https://imgur.com/gallery/17tib1E Food, Family, and Animals https://imgur.com/gallery/zlsjOQa Work, Politics and America https://imgur.com/gallery/zQrWXQE ADHD, Autism, Mental Health, and Millenial https://imgur.com/gallery/G1E6yWd NSFW Memes https://imgur.com/gallery/2I9HXEp Reactions https://imgur.com/gallery/uDjMX0P
item.dc:creator: GeeeButtersnaps

item.title: Anthropic is afraid... Good
item.description: Sauce https://arstechnica.com/tech-policy/2025/08/ai-industry-horrified-to-face-largest-copyright-class-action-ever-certified/ Tldr that class action suit could not just kill anthropic but AI as a whole because if they were fined for using all kinds of copyrighted material for profit without paying a cent to the rights holders, their business isn't sustainable... Imagine if a retail store owner said that if they had to pay for their inventory instead of stealing it, their store wouldn't be profitable...
item.dc:creator: Killerpixler

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1437 (formal apocalyptic)
item.description:
Neither: let's get this existential bread.
Except we're all hotter than normal and the Monsoon has failed, but who cares, we have a woman running for state senate who says women shouldn't vote, so.... Yeah. *sighs.*
There's more than a few Sir Terry Pratchett memes in today's dump.
If I ever marry, formal apocalyptic seems fine with me, along with a literal potato bar with all kinds of cooked potatoes. Position is still open.
I'm gonna have to probably go with Longisquama. Which we now know is a Drepanosaur!!! Another childhood mystery solved! Science is wonderful.
I've hit the point where anything that is remotely interesting anywhere that i see gets an application. I mean, nobody is going to read it, so whatever.
The murder of Flavius Aetius
Probably unpopular opinion: I don't like most of the newer seasons of Night Vale.
Racking my Mesopotamian-inspired mead now. I'm thinking of changing the name to [hashtag]OKSumer, instead of "Ea-Naşir's Special Brew"
I keep thinking about going back on hinge, but do i REALLY need more existential rejection in my life right now? No. Nor do i want to risk leaning too hard on someone i'm dating as a therapist style figure. With too much up in the air, I'm not stable enough.
This. THIS. This could also be a Tao of Pratchett.
Definitely turn the sound on for this one.
I should learn to just shut up and keep it simple.
I love when Pippin hides/snuggles in my beard.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Baby! Peekaboo! Peekaboo! [Coughing noises] [squeak-toy noise] Pippin." ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself. 3) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on. 4) all funds from the sales of items at these two links will be sent to support charities aiding to fight for Trans rights in the US (not just T-shirts!) https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74812801-all-conures-are-anarchists https://www.teepublic.com/t-shirt/74811778-whiptail-pride 5) Since multiple people have requested this over the last two weeks or so, my ko-fi is: https://ko-fi.com/codyandpippin
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: You are worthy to have your picture taken.
item.description:
This! This is SO true!
Most of my pictures are of me and my son now since his mother's passing. Every once in a while he asks to look at a picture of the three of us from one of his early birthdays. It gives him a big smile and me as well.
item.dc:creator: Herebychoice

item.title: Fun video dump for full smiles!
item.description:
Noodling is such an interesting technique for catching fish.
Karen's gonna Karen
He reminds me so much of my nephew. That kid just loves hanging out with me and playing Pokemon Go
This is just so adorable
Not everyone has amazing family. But I do. This isn't me, but my family helps me so much.
We're really specs of dust..
Bro nopes out.
This dude is definitely forklift certified
Bro, what are you doing?!
Times were different back on the 90s.
Guys gonna be guys.
I wish they were careful like this here...
There are good people out there folks. We only notice the assholes more.
Dawww ❤️❤️❤️
I love it when kids do thoughtful things for people. The joy in their face.
I'm sorry, I know.. I hate this stupid crap people add to phone videos.
He's so grateful for his burger ❤️
item.dc:creator: PepperoniAndFingernailPizza

item.title: A photo of my dog Panko every day
item.dc:creator: PankoBoy

item.title: What's the matter? You haven't eaten your lizard.
item.description: For those wondering, THIS is a kookaburra. They're a bird native to Australia and known for their distinctive call. If you've ever seen a movie/show with a jungle scene and heard what sounded like monkeys whooping and hollering in the background, you were most likely actually hearing the call of one of these birds.
item.dc:creator: SquirrelWithATophat

item.title: GovBrief Today - What Happened #190
item.description: A local Georgia cop is dead after a shooter opened fire in Atlanta near the CDC, but Trump’s political machine continues turning up the heat. Gerrymandering in Texas, a billion-dollar shakedown of UCLA, and armed patrols in DC streets are fueling a system that thrives on chaos and fear. If we don’t meet this fire with relentless action, it will burn through what’s left of our democracy. Check out Mobilize, Resistbot, and 5Calls — links to all are here. And don't rely on the algorithm to keep you informed. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so that you always know what's going on. Add your email at govbrief dot today, on Facebook, or on Substack at Gov Brief Today. #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/cdc-shooting-officer-killed 2. https://go.govbrief.today/nc-disaster-relief-held 3. https://go.govbrief.today/armenia-azerbaijan-peace-deal 4. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-putin-meet-alaska 5. https://go.govbrief.today/hegseth-christian-nationalist-video 6. https://go.govbrief.today/af-denies-transgender-retirement 7. https://go.govbrief.today/long-removed-irs-head 8. https://go.govbrief.today/fed-chair-new-names 9. https://go.govbrief.today/intel-ceo-responds-trump 10. https://go.govbrief.today/doj-probes-ny-ag 11. https://go.govbrief.today/appeals-court-blocks-contempt 12. https://go.govbrief.today/texas-ag-remove-democrats 13. https://go.govbrief.today/newsom-special-redistricting-election 14. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-one-billion-ucla 15. https://go.govbrief.today/admin-investigating-harvard-patents 16. https://go.govbrief.today/feds-patrol-dc-again 17. https://go.govbrief.today/epa-terminates-unions 18. https://go.govbrief.today/smithsonian-revises-impeachment-text 19. https://go.govbrief.today/trump-phone-delayed-again Yesterday's Most Read Story - https://go.govbrief.today/trump-changed-medicare-donation Fighting Back - https://go.govbrief.today/nonprofit-sues-epstein-files Subscribe (It's Free!) - https://gbounacos.substack.com
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos
